name: subscription-billing-subscription-analytics-aggregator
description: T212 SubscriptionAnalyticsAggregator — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Additive-subtractive MRR aggregation: BOTH SubscriptionActivated (add) AND SubscriptionCancelled (subtract) handlers required. normalizeMrr() is MACHINE formula. SubscriptionMetricsUpdated has NO subscriberId field.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: BOTH event handlers required (Activated+Cancelled), additive-subtractive MRR, normalizeMrr() formula MACHINE code, SubscriptionMetricsUpdated lacks subscriberId
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + additive-subtractive-aggregate + dual-event-handler + mrr-normalization + metrics-no-pii patterns for T212

Break T212 into: handler1 SubscriptionActivated → add plan.monthlyPrice to MRR aggregate | handler2 SubscriptionCancelled → subtract plan.monthlyPrice from MRR aggregate → normalizeMrr() → storeDocument(metricsRecord) → emit SubscriptionMetricsUpdated (NO subscriberId)

Generate subscription-analytics-aggregator.service.ts — TWO @EventPattern handlers: (1) SubscriptionActivated adds plan.monthlyPrice to MRR, (2) SubscriptionCancelled subtracts plan.monthlyPrice from MRR. normalizeMrr() is MACHINE formula — never move to FREEDOM config. SubscriptionMetricsUpdated event MUST NOT include subscriberId (aggregate metric, not PII). Both handlers required — missing either is a bug.
Named check validation: both_event_handlers_present, activated_adds_mrr, cancelled_subtracts_mrr, normalize_mrr_machine_code, metrics_updated_no_subscriber_id
Score generated code 0-100 against T212 iron rules: both handlers, additive-subtractive logic, normalizeMrr MACHINE formula, no subscriberId in metrics event
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate

DPO triple: chosen=dual-handler+additive-subtractive-mrr+normalize-machine+no-subscriberId-in-metrics, rejected=missing-cancelled-handler OR mrr-add-only OR subscriberId-in-metrics-event OR normalizeMrr-in-freedom-config. curriculumTier=2.

entry: Triggered by SubscriptionActivated OR SubscriptionCancelled CloudEvents
